hero.title: Strategic repositioning & digital growth for HORECA establishments
hero.subtitle: We transform neighborhood restaurants into structured, profitable local references.

problem.title: The challenge facing HORECA establishments today

invisibility.title: Online invisibility
invisibility.description: Your establishment doesn't appear in relevant local searches. Potential customers can't find you.

positioning.title: Unclear positioning
positioning.description: Customers don't understand what differentiates you. Your offering lacks clarity and appeal.

wordOfMouth.title: Dependence on word-of-mouth
wordOfMouth.description: No predictable customer acquisition system. Your success depends on chance recommendations.

competition.title: City center competition
competition.description: You're losing customers to better positioned, more visible, more structured establishments.

specialty.title: We specialize in local HORECA repositioning
points: Real demographic analysis of the neighborhood
Growth in average spend and recurrence

brussels.title: Precise knowledge of the Brussels terrain
brussels.subtitle: We don't work 'in Belgium'. We work neighborhood by neighborhood.

mapping.title: Fine reading of micro-neighborhoods
mapping.description: Schaerbeek is not Ixelles. Laeken is not Chatelain. Each zone has its demographics, purchasing power, consumption culture.

multilingual.title: Strategic trilingual strategy
multilingual.description: FR → dominant local clientele | NL → often under-addressed audience | EN → expats & captive international customers. We structure distinct entry points, not translations.

traffic.title: Clean traffic that books
traffic.description: We don't work on likes. We work on calls, Google Maps directions, reservations, occupancy rate.

method.title: Our method in 3 phases
method.subtitle: A structured process of repositioning and growth

whatWeDontDo.title: What we don't do
whatWeDontDo.subtitle: To be clear about our positioning

pricing.title: Our offers
pricing.subtitle: Transparency and measurable results
pricing.note: Every project starts with a personalized diagnosis.

before.title: Before : A quality establishment, but invisible
before.description: Excellent cuisine, authentic atmosphere, but no structured digital presence. The potential is there, but no one sees it.

diagnostic.title: The diagnosis : Understanding the terrain
diagnostic.description: In-depth analysis of the neighborhood, competition, seasonal opportunities. We identify growth levers specific to your location.

repositioning.title: The repositioning : Creating visibility
repositioning.description: Google Business optimization, targeted content strategy, local activation. Your establishment becomes visible to the right people, at the right time.

contact.title: Let's start a conversation
contact.subtitle: Every project starts with a personalized diagnosis
